## Problem

A clear description of the problem you're facing or the use case you want to enable.
Example: "It's frustrating when..." or "I want to be able to..."

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
